Content:
Demis Hassabis is the Cofounder and CEO of Google Deepmind.
Dario Amodei is the Cofounder and CEO of Anthropic.

title: Demis Hassabis - Co-Founder & CEO, Google DeepMind | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: Demis Hassabis > About
Content:
Co-Founder & CEO of Google DeepMind - working on AGI, responsible for AI breakthroughs such as AlphaGo, the first program to beat the world champion at the game of Go; and AlphaFold, which cracked the 50-year grand challenge of protein structure prediction and was recognised with the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. Revolutionising drug discovery at Isomorphic Labs. Ultimately trying to understand the fundamental nature of reality.

title: Demis Hassabis | The Center for Brains, Minds & Machines
excerpts: Section Title: Demis Hassabis Content: Demis Hassabis Co-founder and CEO of DeepMind Google DeepMind **Demis Hassabis** is the co-founder and CEO of DeepMind, a neuroscience-inspired AI company, bought by Google in Jan 2014 in their largest European acquisition to date. He is now Vice President of Engineering at Google DeepMind and leads Google’s general AI efforts, including the development of AlphaGo, the first program to ever beat a professional player at the game of Go.

title: The time I met Demis Hassabis | by Glen Yu - Medium
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Knighted and Nobel Prize laureate, Sir Demis Hassabis is the co-founder & CEO of [Google De...
Content:
Glen Yu
5 min read
·
May 27, 2025
--
Listen
Share
 ... 
Section Title: The time I met Demis Hassabis > Some background…
Content:
Now that you know how special that five-game match was, you can begin to understand why I suddenly became a huge fan of Google DeepMind and its co-founder, Demis Hassabis.
Demis also jointly won the [Nobel Prize in Chemistry in 2024](https://www.nobelprize.org/prizes/chemistry/2024/press-release/) for his contribution to advancing AI’s protein structure prediction with AlphaFold2. Let’s not forget the Wizard of Oz x the Sphere collaboration that I wrote about in my Google Next ’25 recap — something that wouldn’t have happened without DeepMind’s AI work.

title: Demis Hassabis's research works | Google Inc. and other places
excerpts:
Section Title: Demis Hassabis’s research while affiliated with Google Inc. and other places > Publications (157)
Content:
A long-standing goal of artificial intelligence is to build systems capable of complex reasoning in vast domains, a task epitomized by mathematics with its boundless concepts and demand for rigorous proof. Recent AI systems, often reliant on human data, typically lack the formal verification necessary to guarantee correctness. By contrast, formal languages such as Lean1 offer an interactive environment that grounds reasoning, and reinforcement learning (RL) provides a mechanism for learning in such environments. We present AlphaProof, an AlphaZero-inspired2 agent that learns to find formal proofs through RL by training on millions of auto-formalized problems. For the most difficult problems, it uses Test-Time RL, a method of generating and learning from millions of related problem variants at inference time to enable deep, problem-specific adaptation.

title: Demis Hassabis
excerpts: **Sir Demis Hassabis** (born 27 July 1976) is a British artificial intelligence (AI) researcher, and entrepreneur. He is the chief executive officer and co-founder of Google DeepMind , <sup>[[ 8 ]]()</sup> and Isomorphic Labs , <sup>[[ 9 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 10 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 11 ]]()</sup> and a UK Government AI Adviser. <sup>[[ 12 ]](.UK-12)</sup> In 2024, Hassabis and John M. Jumper were jointly awarded the Nobel Prize in Chemistry for their AI research contributions for protein structure prediction . <sup>[[ 13 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 14 ]]()</sup>
